entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: Malinaw na harap na nagtatanong isang ideya.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Karaniwang patibong na nagbababala laban sa posibleng pagkakamali.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Maikling likod na kumukumpleto sa diwa.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Hint na tumutulong nang hindi ibinibigay ang lahat.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: Isang Repasuhin pagpili kaya missed mga card reGawing sooner.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: Isang simple flashcard workflow

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: Isang mas malakas card nagtatanong para sa recall:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Isang kapaki-pakinabang card nagtatanong isa thing. Ito dapat hindi hide lima mga tanong inside isa prompt. Ito dapat maging tiyak enough sa sagot, pero hindi kaya narrow na ito becomes meaningless.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Isang mahina AI flashcard says:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: aktibong paggunita

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Add mga hint nang walang giving away ang sagot

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang tulong Gumawa ng mga flashcard faster, pero ang pag-aaral pa rin comes mula sa retrieval. Kung ang tool writes ang mga card at ang mag-aaral never struggles sa sagot sila, almost nothing mayroon changed. Ang kapaki-pakinabang version ginagawang magulo mga tala tungo sa nakapokus mga prompt, pagkatapos gumagawa ang mag-aaral recall bago revealing ang sagot.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang Gawing magaspang mga tala tungo sa cleaner retrieval mga prompt. Ito Maaari bang split broad mga ideya tungo sa smaller mga card, add mga halimbawa, at identify traps isang mag-aaral might miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI mga flashcard at aktibong pag-alala: paano matandaan mas marami

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply isang konsepto sa isang small halimbawa.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Humingi ng one-idea mga card kasama ang mga hint at karaniwang patibongs.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Likod: "Spacing forces memory sa reconstruct ang sagot pagkatapos some forgetting, alin strengthens later recall."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: Ihambing ang dalawa mga ideya;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: define isang term;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Delete mga card na ay too broad o obvious.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Gawin hindi Repasuhin everything equally

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Madali. Push ito later.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: Ipaliwanag ang isang cause;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Mga flashcard ay isa ng ang simplest ways sa gawin ito.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Mga flashcard ay powerful, pero sila ay hindi ang whole study iproseso. Sila ay pinakamahusay para sa retrieval, bokabularyo, definitions, formulas, distinctions, at key mga halimbawa. Sila ay mas mahina kapag ang mag-aaral mayroon never understood ang ideya sa ang una place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Mga flashcard work pinakamahusay kapag sila Subukan ang isa ideya at isang oras, reveal mga sagot lamang pagkatapos effort, at Repasuhin missed mga card sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Para sa isang deeper ruta, Basahin ang Flashcard Builder gabay at ang Flashcard Builder mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral. Ang layunin ay hindi isang beautiful deck. Ang layunin ay remembering mas marami kapag ang mga tala ay gone.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: Para sa halimbawa:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Harap: "Bakit spaced Repasuhin work mas mahusay kaysa cramming?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Mahirap. Repasuhin pagkatapos isang short delay.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Hint: "Think tungkol sa forgetting at retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Mga hint ay kapaki-pakinabang kapag sila preserve effort. Isang bad hint ay ang sagot sa disguise. Isang mahusay hint narrows ang search kalawakan.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identify isang karaniwan pagkakamali;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Kung isang card keeps failing, gawin hindi lamang repeat ito. Magtanong bakit ito ay mahirap. Gamitin Socratic Instruction sa uncover ang maling akala, Math Hakbang Coach para sa procedural gaps, o ang AI pag-aaral aklatan ng mga prompt hanapin isang mas mahusay study prompt.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's Flashcard Builder ay designed sa paligid ng na aktibong pag-alala loop: Bumuo ng isang deck, subukan ang harap, reveal ang sagot, rate iyong recall, at Repasuhin ang misses until ang ideya sticks.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. Repasuhin soon.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Isa pagkakamali mga mag-aaral Gumawa ng ay treating bawat card ang same. Kung ikaw alam isang card instantly, pagrepaso ito again tomorrow may waste oras. Kung ikaw miss isang card, waiting isang week may maging too long.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Pair mga flashcard kasama ang understanding

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Paste isang small chunk ng mga tala tungo sa Flashcard Builder.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: ang iproseso mga halaman Gamitin gumawa food.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: I-rate nang tapat ang recall.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Pagbabasa mga tala feels productive. Remembering sila later ay ang totoo test.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: Tandaan isang sequence;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Repasuhin nang walang looking at ang likod.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Malakas mga card madalas isama:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills sa pag-aaral

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Na hint tumutulong ang mag-aaral magsimula nang walang removing ang act ng remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder ay designed para sa ito reveal-and-rate loop: subukan una, reveal second, rate honestly, pagkatapos bring mahina mga card likod sooner.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Na ay bakit aktibong pag-alala matters. Instead ng looking at ang sagot, ikaw subukan sa pull ito mula sa memory. Ang effort strengthens ang memory at reveals ano pa rin kailangan work.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Ang mag-aaral pa rin mayroon sa gawin ang remembering. Na ay ang punto.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Ang second card gumagawa ang mag-aaral retrieve isang relationship, hindi simple recognize isang sentence. Mahusay mga card karaniwan pokus sa isa ng mga ito mga gawain:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Ito ginagawa hindi kailangan sa maging complicated. Ang important part ay na iyong Repasuhin schedule responds sa memory instead ng treating ang deck like isang static list.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Subukan ito sa Flashcard Builder. Kung ikaw kailangan maunawaan ang paksa bago paggawa mga card, magsimula sa Matutunan ang Anything. Kung ikaw gusto presyon pagkatapos pagrepaso mga card, lumipat tungo sa Quiz Ako Sa Trivia o Viva Pagsasanay.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: Gawing mga tala tungo sa mas mahusay mga card

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Gawing paulit-ulit misses tungo sa isang tanong para sa Matutunan ang Anything.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Gamitin ito loop:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Gamitin tatlo ratings:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: Ano ang papel ng chlorophyll sa photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: Ano ang nagpapang isang mahusay flashcard

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Kapag ikaw paste mga tala tungo sa AI, magtanong ito sa split broad mga ideya tungo sa mga iyon mga gawain. Isang deck kasama ang 18 tiyak mga card ay karaniwan mas mahusay kaysa isang deck kasama ang 5 giant mga card na bawat contain isang whole talata.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: Saan nakakatulong ang AI
